properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve lived stories that have proved Your faithfulness I’ve seen miracles my mind can’t comprehend There is beauty in what I can’t understand Jesus it’s You Jesus it’s You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I believe You’re the wonder-working God You’re the wonder-working God All the miracles I’ve seen Too good to not believe You’re the wonder-working God And You heal because You love Oh the miracles we’ll see You’re too good to not believe Too good to not believe Too good to not believe

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can’t resurrect a man with my own hands But just the mention of Your name can raise the dead All the glory to the only One who can Jesus it’s You Jesus it’s You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We’ve seen cancer disappear We’ve seen broken bodies healed Don’t you tell me He can’t do it Don’t you tell me He can’t do it

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We’ve seen real life resurrection We’ve seen mental health restored Don’t you tell me He can’t do it Don’t you tell me He can’t do it

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We’ve seen families reunited We’ve seen prodigals return Don’t you tell me He can’t do it Don’t you tell me He can’t do it

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We’ve seen troubled souls delivered We’ve seen addicts finally freed Don’t you tell me He can’t do it Don’t you tell me He can’t do it

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We’ll see cities in revival And salvation flood the streets Don’t you tell me He can’t do it Don’t you tell me He can’t do it

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We’ll see glory fill the nations Like the world has never seen Don’t you tell me He can’t do it Cause I know that He can Jesus You are my miracle
